_documentation: Workflows under .github/workflows that include pull_request (directly or under branches) against mainline. Use for parity reviews with local npm scripts and hosted-only exceptions.

pullRequestWorkflows.localMirror: npm run verify, npm run test:coverage, npm run pipeline:ci:static, npm run pipeline:surface:suite (see ci.yml jobs)

pullRequestWorkflows.note: CodeQL analysis runs on GitHub runners; local mirror is semgrep + npm audit in quality_security / quality_static_security
Requires Dependency graph; private repos may need GHAS. Complements npm audit in CI.
PR path filter for refinement deletion policy

pullRequestWorkflows.localMirror: npm run check:debugging-sweep, validate:* debugging sweep scripts when paths match
